data.title: OpenVPN releases Access Server 3.0 with major enhancements for performance, flexibility, and usability, including a modern Admin UI.
data.description: OpenVPN, based in Pleasanton, California, unveiled Access Server 3.0, a significant upgrade to its business VPN solution. The latest version focuses on boosting performance, flexibility, and system integration, heralding a new chapter for the platform. Notable updates include a revamped Admin Web UI. Access Server 3.0 also integrates customer-requested improvements aimed at simplifying processes and enhancing overall efficiency. This update marks a pivotal moment for the company, showcasing its commitment to meeting user needs.

data.title: Global PC market grew 7% in Q3 2025 to 72M units: Notebooks up by 4% to 57.2M units, Desktops up by 17% to 15.2M units. Windows 10 end-of-service deadline approaching. Shipments driven by refresh demand.
data.description: In London, recent research from Omdia shows that the combined shipments of desktops, notebooks, and workstations experienced a 6.8% increase, reaching a total of 72 million units in Q3 of 2025. Specifically, notebook shipments, inclusive of mobile workstations, saw a 4% uptick to 57.2 million units, whereas desktop shipments, which encompass desktop workstations, surged by 17% to 15.2 million units. The imminent Windows 10 end-of-support deadline, which is now less than a week away, has been instrumental in prompting a significant refresh demand across all user segments, thereby serving as the primary catalyst behind this shipment growth.

data.title: Duni Group named Employer Branding Company of the Year in Sweden by Karriärföretagen for 2025. Nominated for Career Company of the Year.
data.description: Annually, Karriärföretagen honors Sweden's top employers with awards. This year, Duni Group was named the Employer Branding Company of the Year in the economists category. Additionally, they received a nomination for Career Company of the Year. The awards ceremony took place in MALMÖ. The event occurred on October 9, 2025.
Investors disclose 8.3% ownership stake in Empiric Student Property Plc.

data.title: Sharps Technology partners with Coinbase to invest over $400 million in Solana, signaling a major move into blockchain finance.
data.description: Sharps Technology Inc. revealed a fresh partnership with Coinbase Global Inc. aimed at bolstering its digital asset treasury approach, particularly concentrating on Solana (CRYPTO: SOL/USD). This move signals a substantial entry into blockchain-based financial infrastructure. The company has already procured more than 2 million SOL, which is presently worth above $400 million, as Solana's current trading price exceeds $210. Under the collaboration, Sharps Technology Inc. plans to leverage Coinbase Prime's custody infrastructure for managing its digital assets.

data.title: Google required employees to share data with AI healthcare tool for benefits; backtracked due to backlash. Staff alarmed about sharing medical info externally.
data.description: Reportedly, Google informed employees that in order to receive health benefits, they needed to allow a third-party AI healthcare tool, Nayya, access to their data. This rule applied to U.S.-based employees of Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) during the upcoming enrollment period, as stated in an internal document seen by Business Insider. Those who chose not to share their data with Nayya were initially informed that they would be ineligible for health benefits. This caused unease among employees regarding sharing sensitive medical information with an external tool. However, Google later revised its policy following negative feedback. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Marc Fisher LTD marks 10 years of innovative footwear, evolving into a beloved brand with cross-generational appeal.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, it was reported that Marc Fisher LTD has reached a significant achievement by commemorating its 10th year in the industry. Initially starting as a niche shoe brand, the company has grown into a well-loved label recognized for its combination of casual luxury and enduring style, appealing to a wide range of age groups.

data.title: 21 new crypto ETF filings have been submitted as Bitcoin rises during 'Uptober'.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global population has hit a record 7.8 billion people, with the United States contributing 331 million to this number. Additionally, the report shows that the world's GDP has reached $87.75 trillion, with China boasting the largest economy at $14.34 trillion. It also highlights that the global unemployment rate has risen to 5.7%, with 190 million people around the world currently without a job. On a positive note, the report mentions that global poverty rates have decreased by 9% compared to last year, with an estimated 600 million people living in poverty.

data.title: EU rules for digital assets overlook non-transferable tokens, causing regulatory uncertainty. Blockchain Sandbox offers a solution.
data.description: New European Union regulations currently treat all tokens as transferable, which has resulted in non-transferable digital assets facing uncertainty in terms of regulation. However, Blockchain Sandbox has introduced a solution to this issue.

data.title: Hycroft Mining increases public offering to 23,076,924 shares of common stock at undisclosed pricing.
data.description: In Winnemucca, Nevada on October 9, 2025, Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: HYMC) revealed the pricing details of its public underwritten offering. The company announced the offering of 23,076,924 shares of Class A common stock at a public rate.

data.title: Partnership brings RLUSD stablecoin to Bahrain with Ripple's custody solution, targeting financial institutions.
data.description: Ripple is collaborating with Bahrain Fintech Bay to introduce its custody solution and RLUSD stablecoin to financial institutions in Bahrain. This partnership signifies a step towards enhancing the financial infrastructure in the region, extending Ripple's solutions to a new market. Through this venture, Bahrain's financial sector will benefit from Ripple's technology, facilitating secure transactions and promoting stability. This initiative is set to impact the financial landscape of Bahrain significantly, with the potential to revolutionize the way institutions conduct business.

data.title: Currenc Group secures up to $33M in convertible note financing, $30M if fully funded, enhancing growth strategy.
data.description: Singapore, October 9, 2025 - Today, Currenc Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR) shared plans to issue and sell up to $33.0 million of unsecured convertible promissory notes, due October 8, 2027. The agreement, once fully funded, is expected to bring in $30.0 million in new funding for the Company, with an initial $4.4 million already closed. This initial closure has provided the Company with $4.0 million in net proceeds, with the remaining amount to be drawn gradually based on specific conditions outlined in the financing documents. The ultimate aim of this financing move is to fortify Currenc's balance sheet, fostering further growth opportunities and enhancing strategic initiatives in the fintech sector.

data.title: King Risk Partners appoints Scott Popilek as CEO as it grows rapidly, now the 51st largest U.S. insurance brokerage.
data.description: In Gainesville, Florida on October 9, 2025, King Risk Partners, positioned as the 51st largest insurance brokerage firm in the United States, has appointed Scott Popilek as its new Chief Executive Officer. This announcement comes as Popilek takes on the new role after serving in the Atlantic region.

data.title: JAKKS Pacific, Inc. to announce Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 30 after market close.
data.description: Santa Monica, California-based company JAKKS Pacific, Inc. (NASDAQ: JAKK) is set to reveal its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on October 30, 2025, following the market closure on that day.

data.title: ProStar Geocorp unveils LinQD, a new data exchange platform for critical infrastructure, offering open API access.
data.description: ProStar has officially launched LinQD™ (Linking Quantitative Data), a cutting-edge open API platform for data exchange. This platform is designed to revolutionize the sharing of information, enhancing connectivity and collaboration among users. With LinQD™, users can seamlessly exchange quantitative data, promoting efficiency and accuracy in decision-making processes. This launch marks a significant milestone for ProStar, as they aim to provide a user-friendly and advanced tool for data sharing.

data.title: Global Kidney Preservation Market valued at $64.5 Mn in 2025, to reach $104.9 Mn by 2032 with 7.2% CAGR. Static cold storage method remains popular, North America leads with 37.3% share. CKD prevalence drives demand for kidney preservation solutions. High cost of advanced technologies limits market growth. Rise in kidney transplants presents growth opportunities.
data.description: The Global Kidney Preservation Market is estimated to be valued at USD 64.5 million in 2025, with a projected growth to USD 104.9 million by 2032 at a CAGR of 7.2%. Factors such as increasing kidney-related disorders, advancements in organ preservation technologies, and rising global transplantation rates are driving market growth. Static cold storage (SCS) method holds 42.3% market share, University of Wisconsin (UW) solution segment is expected to account for one-third of the market share in 2025. The deceased donor kidney category is set to dominate with 65.8% market share. North America leads with 37.3% market share, while Asia Pacific shows potential growth. Factors like rising chronic kidney disease cases and expanding kidney transplantations drive the market. However, the high cost of advanced preservation technologies may limit market growth. There is a rise in kidney transplants globally, with over 95,479 reported by the Global Observatory on Donation and Transplant.
